episodes.title: How a DELUSION killed MILLIONS - Taiping Heavenly Kingdom Part 1
episodes.description:
THANK YOU SO MUCH FOR WATCHING!!! PLEASE SUBSCRIBE AND LIKE! 

I spent an amazing ammount of time on this video and I really hope you guys end up enjoying it somewhat. I'm still learning the direction of my content and wanted to give this style a good try.

This is the story of the deadliest cult in history and honestly it really peaked my interest when I learned about it and truly wanted to share this with others.
